label: Think node conditional body size
description: Conditional node whose condition passes when the pawn's body size is within [min, max]. Inherits ThinkNode_Conditional fields (including invert) and base ThinkNode fields.

min.label: Min
min.description: Minimum body size (inclusive) for the condition to pass.

max.label: Max
max.description: Maximum body size (inclusive) for the condition to pass.
